cadence: certified ~3x/year (Advance Jul, P-1 Feb, P-2 Jun); URL pinned per certification
caveats: This is the STATE-AID portion of school funding — the Principal Apportionment the state pays through counties. Local property taxes that fund the rest of each district's LCFF entitlement are not in these figures.
Figures are the certified apportionment calculation for the fiscal year shown, including prior-year adjustments; monthly cash follows the State Controller's payment schedule.
The apportionment year is the CURRENT budget year, while district spending (SACS) reports the last completed year — the two sit side by side and are never subtracted from each other.
